description: Cross-microdomain contracts within the Construction DNA kernel stack

intra_kernel_contracts.contract: Every material_properties record must reference a valid material_identity
Relationship endpoints must reference valid material_identity records
Composition entries must reference a valid material_identity as parent
Constraints must reference a valid material_identity
Context records must reference a valid material_identity
Lineage chains must originate from a valid material_identity

cross_kernel_contracts.contract: Taxonomy projections must reference valid material_identity records. Taxonomy never creates or modifies material_identity.
Material relationship compatibility references may cite Chemistry Kernel interaction profiles. Material DNA does not mutate Chemistry truth.
